'''R6-S1''' was the [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech unit]] of elite [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Eelo Begraas]]. Nicknamed "'''Shootfirst'''", the droid helped him fly his customized [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] [[Dicer (starfighter)|''Dicer'']].

==Behind the scenes==
This droid was twice referred to as R6-S1 and once referred as R6-A1.
